name: Grade 4 Geography — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 4 pathway for human-environment interaction, maps, data, and geographic arguments. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 4 knowledge and transferable skills in human-environment interaction, maps, data, and geographic arguments.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
